message:
test(cass): add 39 proptest serde roundtrips for uncovered cass types

Adds comprehensive proptest coverage for CassSearchResult, CassSearchHit,
CassViewResult, CassContextLine, CassIndexResult, CassStatus, plus
cass-export gated types (CassExportQuery, CassContentExportQuery,
CassExportSessionRecord, CassExportContentChunk). Includes serde
roundtrip, Clone, Default, and JSON validity property tests. Test count
goes from 34 to 73 (all passing).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
